scripts.dev:resort: TENANT_ID=resort-example node scripts/prepare-tenant.js && TENANT_ID=resort-example next dev -p 3001
scripts.dev:bike: TENANT_ID=vukans-bike node scripts/prepare-tenant.js && TENANT_ID=vukans-bike next dev -p 3002
scripts.build:resort: BUILD_CLEAN_ANALYZE=1 TENANT_ID=resort-example node scripts/prepare-tenant.js && TENANT_ID=resort-example next build
scripts.build:bike: BUILD_CLEAN_ANALYZE=1 TENANT_ID=vukans-bike node scripts/prepare-tenant.js && TENANT_ID=vukans-bike next build
scripts.build:resort:analyze: BUILD_CLEAN_ANALYZE=1 TENANT_ID=resort-example node scripts/prepare-tenant.js && TENANT_ID=resort-example ANALYZE=true next build
scripts.build:bike:analyze: BUILD_CLEAN_ANALYZE=1 TENANT_ID=vukans-bike node scripts/prepare-tenant.js && TENANT_ID=vukans-bike ANALYZE=true next build
